tagline: Enjoy A Crystal Clear Pool All Year Without the Hassle

hero.headline: CPO-Certified Pool Care You Can Trust
hero.subheadline: South Florida's veteran-owned pool service with 14+ years of five-star results. Every technician is CPO-certified so your pool stays crystal clear without you lifting a finger.

services.headline: Complete Pool Care Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full remodels, our certified team handles everything so you just enjoy the water.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough weekly maintenance including vacuuming, skimming, brushing, and precise chemical balancing to keep your water sparkling year-round.

cards.title: Pool Repairs & Equipment
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems by certified technicians who get it right the first time.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Replastering
cards.description: Transform your aging pool with fresh plaster, modern tile, and upgraded finishes that make your backyard feel brand new.

cards.title: Leak Detection
cards.description: Advanced technology pinpoints leaks fast, saving you from costly water loss and structural damage before problems escalate.

cards.title: Heater Installation & Repair
cards.description: Professional gas heater and heat pump installation so you can swim comfortably any time of year, even on cooler Florida evenings.

cards.title: Salt Systems & Automation
cards.description: Upgrade to salt chlorine or smart automation for silky-smooth water, lower chemical costs, and effortless pool management from your phone.

steps.title: Request Your Free Estimate
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll schedule a convenient time to assess your pool and discuss your needs — no obligation.

steps.title: Get a Custom Care Plan
steps.description: Your dedicated CPO-certified technician creates a tailored maintenance or repair plan based on your pool's specific requirements.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: Relax while we handle everything. You'll come home to sparkling water every week with zero hassle on your end.

about.label: About AJ Pools
about.headline: A Veteran-Owned Family Business Since 2012
about.description: Andrew earned his CPO certification at just 18 years old and turned his passion for pool care into a full-service company trusted by hundreds of South Florida families. As a veteran-operated business, we bring discipline, reliability, and pride to every job. After 14+ years and 159+ five-star reviews, our commitment remains the same: treat every pool like it's our own.

features.title: CPO-Certified Technicians
features.description: Every technician holds a current CPO certification ensuring expert-level pool care on every visit.

features.title: Veteran-Operated Reliability
features.description: Military discipline meets pool care. We show up on time, every time, and get the job done right.

features.title: No Contracts Ever
features.description: We earn your business every week with results, not paperwork. Cancel anytime, no fees, no hassle.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Get a free custom quote for your pool. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts — just honest service from certified professionals.

guarantee.headline: Our Crystal Clear Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool isn't sparkling after our visit, we'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. With 14 years of five-star results and CPO-certified technicians on every job, we stand behind our work 100%. Your satisfaction isn't just a promise — it's how we've built our reputation.

faqs.question: Are all your technicians really CPO-certified?
faqs.answer: Yes — every single technician on our team holds a current Certified Pool Operator certification. This means they understand water chemistry, equipment mechanics, and safety standards at a professional level, not just basic cleaning.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: In most cases, we can begin within the same week. We also offer same-day service for urgent repairs like pump failures, green pools, or leak emergencies. Call us and we'll get you scheduled fast.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during pool service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients give us gate access and go about their day. You'll always receive a service summary so you know exactly what was done, even if you weren't there.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in South Florida?
faqs.answer: We serve Pompano Beach, Boca Raton, Parkland, Coral Springs, Coconut Creek, Delray Beach, Deerfield Beach, Lighthouse Point, and surrounding communities throughout South Florida.

faqs.question: Are you locked into a contract for weekly cleaning?
faqs.answer: No long-term contracts required. We earn your business every week with consistent, reliable results. Most clients stay with us for years simply because they love the service — not because they're locked in.

testimonials.name: Long-term Customer
testimonials.text: We have been using AJ Pools for 6 years. The owner Andrew calls to check in for customer satisfaction and office manager Alicia is extremely responsive. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Condo Board Member
testimonials.text: After switching to AJ Pool Services following issues with a previous company, we are extremely happy with the service. Knowledgeable, courteous and punctual with chemical water levels kept within all required ranges.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: Very thorough, got the job done same day. Very professional. Great service and always on time. A job well done by knowledgeable technicians.

contact.headline: Ready for a Hassle-Free Pool?
contact.subtitle: Get your free estimate from South Florida's most trusted CPO-certified pool team. No pressure, no obligation.
benefits: CPO-certified technician assigned to your pool

footer.description: AJ Pools is a veteran-owned, CPO-certified pool service company proudly serving South Florida homeowners since 2012. We deliver crystal clear results with integrity, professionalism, and a personal touch.
footer.service_area: Serving Pompano Beach, Boca Raton, Parkland, Coral Springs, Coconut Creek, Delray Beach, Deerfield Beach, Lighthouse Point, and surrounding South Florida communities.
